AI Agent Audit
GitHubGet Early Access
Open Source MCP Server

Your AI agents handle
sensitive data.
Now you can prove it.

Immutable audit logging and policy enforcement for AI agent workflows. Know exactly what your agents did, what data they touched, and whether any action crossed a boundary.

View on GitHubJoin Waitlist
claude_desktop_config.json
{"mcpServers":{"agent-audit-trail":{"command":"npx","args":["agent-audit-trail"]}}}

The problem

AI agents are transforming how professionals work. But if you handle client data in finance, law, healthcare, insurance, or HR, you can't adopt agents without answering one question:

"What did the AI do with my client's data, and can you prove it?"

Without an audit trail, the answer is no. That locks your firm out of the productivity gains your competitors are already capturing. Agent Audit Trail gives you the paper trail so you can say yes.

How it works

Immutable Audit Trail

Every agent action logged with full context. What tool was called, what data was accessed, what the outcome was. Tamper-proof by design.

Policy Engine

Configurable rules that flag or block risky actions in real time. PII detection, financial thresholds, and destructive operations caught before they cause damage.

Compliance Export

One-click export of audit logs formatted for regulatory review. Built with Colorado SB 205, EU AI Act, and SOX requirements in mind.

Zero-Friction Install

Add one line to your MCP config. No code changes, no infrastructure, no vendor lock-in. Works with Claude, GPT, and any MCP-compatible agent.

Built for professionals with client data

If your work involves sensitive information, this is for you.

Financial AdvisorsCan't use AI agents on client portfolios without proving data was handled properly.
Law FirmsNeed documentation that AI tools didn't expose privileged client information.
HR ConsultantsAI-assisted screening requires audit trails to satisfy anti-discrimination regulations.
Insurance AgenciesAgents processing claims data need verifiable logging for regulatory audits.
Accounting FirmsClient financial data touched by AI must be tracked and reportable.

Get early access

The MCP server is free and open source on GitHub today. Join the waitlist for the hosted dashboard with team management, advanced policies, and compliance reporting.
